allow: PowerShell($elec = 'node_modules/.pnpm/electron@42.0.0/node_modules/electron'; "path.txt exists: $\(Test-Path "$elec/path.txt"\)"; if \(Test-Path "$elec/path.txt"\) { "  contents: $\(Get-Content "$elec/path.txt"\)" }; "dist exists:     $\(Test-Path "$elec/dist"\)"; if \(Test-Path "$elec/dist"\) { "  files: $\(\(Get-ChildItem "$elec/dist" | Measure-Object\).Count\)" }; "exe exists:      $\(Test-Path "$elec/dist/electron.exe"\)"; ''; 'symlink at node_modules/electron:'; Get-Item node_modules/electron | Format-List Name, Target, LinkType)

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('pdf-parse'\); console.log\('exports:', Object.keys\(p\)\); const PDFParse = p.PDFParse; console.log\('proto:', Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(PDFParse.prototype\).filter\(n => n !== 'constructor'\)\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import { PDFParse } from 'pdf-parse'; import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs'; const buf = readFileSync\('tests/unit/fixtures/sample.pdf'\); const p = new PDFParse\({ data: new Uint8Array\(buf\) }\); const info = await p.getInfo\(\); console.log\('info keys:', Object.keys\(info\)\); console.log\('outline?', JSON.stringify\(info.outline ?? info.metadata ?? null, null, 2\).slice\(0, 500\)\); await p.destroy\(\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import { PDFParse } from 'pdf-parse'; import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs'; const buf = readFileSync\('tests/unit/fixtures/sample.pdf'\); const p = new PDFParse\({ data: new Uint8Array\(buf\) }\); const info = await p.getInfo\(\); console.log\('total:', info.total\); console.log\('pages[0] keys:', info.pages && info.pages[0] ? Object.keys\(info.pages[0]\) : 'no pages'\); console.log\('pages[0]:', JSON.stringify\(info.pages?.[0], null, 2\).slice\(0, 400\)\); console.log\('outline len:', info.outline?.length\); console.log\('flattened:'\); function walk\(items, depth=0\) { for \(const it of items\) { console.log\(' '.repeat\(depth*2\), it.title, 'destRef=', it.dest?.[0]\); walk\(it.items ?? [], depth+1\); } } walk\(info.outline ?? []\); await p.destroy\(\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import { PDFParse } from 'pdf-parse'; import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs'; const buf = readFileSync\('tests/unit/fixtures/sample.pdf'\); const p = new PDFParse\({ data: new Uint8Array\(buf\) }\); const info = await p.getInfo\(\); console.log\('pages exists?', !!info.pages, 'is array?', Array.isArray\(info.pages\), 'length:', info.pages?.length\); console.log\('outline len:', info.outline?.length || 0\); console.log\('first outline:', JSON.stringify\(info.outline?.[0], null, 2\)?.slice\(0, 600\)\); await p.destroy\(\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import { PDFParse } from 'pdf-parse'; import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs'; const buf = readFileSync\('tests/unit/fixtures/sample.pdf'\); const p = new PDFParse\({ data: new Uint8Array\(buf\) }\); const doc = await p.load\(\); console.log\('doc kind:', typeof doc, doc.constructor?.name\); console.log\('proto methods:', Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(doc\)\)\); console.log\('numPages:', doc.numPages\); if \(typeof doc.getPageIndex === 'function' && doc.getOutline\) { const outline = await doc.getOutline\(\); console.log\('outline \(raw\):', JSON.stringify\(outline, \(k,v\) => k === 'items' ? '['+v.length+']' : v, 2\).slice\(0, 800\)\); for \(const item of outline.slice\(0, 3\)\) { const idx = await doc.getPageIndex\(item.dest[0]\); console.log\('title=', item.title, ' page=', idx + 1\); } } await p.destroy\(\);")
